news.title:
Latent View surged 9% on a $3M deal with US-based Healtheon AI, boosting healthcare RCM focus.
Despite a YTD -38% dip, PL Capital maintains a 'Buy' with a revised target of ₹490, citing AI growth.

news.title:

Venky Ramesh brings 20+ years of experience in data, digital, and analytics across Infosys, Cognizant, and Capgemini.
